zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Macclesfield於1258年出生在英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德時，她的父親Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I23歲，母親Countess Millicent Hanmer18歲。她於大約1281年與Sir Thomas Davenport在英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1322年在英國英格蘭爾達文波特享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Macclesfield于1258年出生在英国英格兰爾馬可萊斯費爾德时，她的父亲Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I23岁，母亲Countess Millicent Hanmer18岁。她于大约1281年与Sir Thomas Davenport在英国英格兰爾馬可萊斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1322年在英国英格兰爾達文波特享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Macclesfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Maxfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Macclesfield in Cheshire. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Maccel (genitive Macceles) + Old English feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Macclesfield was born in 1258, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I, was 23 and her mother, Countess Millicent Hanmer, was 18. She married Sir Thomas Davenport about 1281, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1322, in Davenport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Macclesfield est née en 1258, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Countess Millicent Hanmer, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Davenport environ 1281, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1322, à Davenport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Macclesfield 1258 in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I 23 und ihre Mutter Countess Millicent Hanmer 18. Sie hat um 1281 in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Davenport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1322 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Davenport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Macclesfield è nata il nel 1258 nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Countess Millicent Hanmer, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Davenport circa 1281, nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1322, nel Davenport, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Macclesfieldが1258年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで生まれた時，父Earl Thomas de Macclesfield Iは23歳，母Countess Millicent Hanmerは18歳であった。約1281年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドでSir Thomas Davenportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1322年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルトで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Macclesfield(이)가 1258년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 맥클스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Millicent Hanmer(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1281년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 맥클스필드에서 Sir Thomas Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 대븐포트에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Macclesfield nasceu em 1258, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Countess Millicent Hanmer, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Davenport aproximadamente 1281, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1322, em Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Macclesfield родилась в 1258 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Countess Millicent Hanmer, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Davenport около 1281 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1322 г. в местности давенпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Macclesfield nació en 1258, en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Countess Millicent Hanmer, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Davenport aproximadamente 1281, en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1322, en Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años.
